name: Persona
author: Oikos
description: Card persona HA: avatar, zona, batteria, passi/km guidati. Layout split con mappa Google Maps live sul lato destro (sfumatura graduale tra info e mappa), campo dedicato per il device_tracker GPS, badge LIVE animato.
description_en: HA person card: avatar, zone, battery, steps/driven km. Split layout with live Google Maps on the right (gradient between info and map), dedicated GPS device_tracker field, animated LIVE badge.
